title: The Straw Hats Return to the Clouds Below
description: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji. The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You... How do you know those words-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why is something like that written...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: this isn't what I wanted to learn...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How can he write in this script...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Yes... Although I have no idea,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That the Rio Poneglyph is actually...?

summary: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
